title: Get ready to apply for SFI26

content.text: As we explained in our last blog post, the Sustainable Farming Incentive 2026 offer (SFI26) will have 2 application windows.
The first window (‘Window 1’) will open in June 2026 for 2 groups:
The second window will open in September 2026 for all farmers and land managers.
Initial SFI26 scheme information for Window 1 applicants
We’ve published the initial part of the SFI26 scheme information for farmers who may be eligible to apply in Window 1 on the SFI26 GOV.UK page.
Full SFI26 scheme information for all applicants
Before Window 1 opens in June 2026, we’ll publish the full SFI26 scheme information for all applicants on the SFI26 GOV.UK page.
We'll let you know when the guidance is live. For the latest updates from the Farming and Countryside team, subscribe to the Farming Blog.
By subscribing, you'll receive an email whenever we publish a new post.
